description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named Phing that runs in the default stage. The job uses the runner's default Docker image (no explicit image) and is limited to runners tagged php7x and composer. It caches the vendor/ directory (including untracked files) between runs. The script executes `composer install` then `./phing build-ci`. It stores the directories `build/phpunit-coverage/` and `build/pdepend/` as job artifacts.
